auth.loginSubtitle: Continuous improvement, one idea at a time.
auth.signupSubtitle: An admin will review and approve your account.

pending.title: Awaiting approval
pending.body: Your account request has been received. An admin needs to approve it before you can sign in — this usually doesn't take long.

feed.title: Idea feed
feed.subtitle: Vote and comment on improvement ideas from across the company.
feed.mySubtitle: Ideas you submitted under your name. Anonymous submissions intentionally do not appear here — save the edit code shown at submission if you need to manage one later.
feed.noMatch: No ideas match these filters yet.
feed.noMatchSub: Try clearing a filter, or be the first to submit one.

idea.submitSubtitle: Use the Problem → Root cause → Solution → Benefit structure to help reviewers act on your idea faster.
idea.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Reduce changeover time on Line 2
idea.benefitPlaceholder: Time saved, cost avoided, safety improved…
idea.anonLabel: Post this idea anonymously — your name will never be shown or stored against it.
idea.saveTokenBody: Your idea was posted anonymously. We do not store any link between it and your account, so this code is the only way to edit or withdraw it later — including for you.
idea.savedContinue: I've saved it — view my idea
idea.votingClosed: Voting is closed for this idea

comment.title: Discussion
comment.noComments: No comments yet — be the first to weigh in.
comment.saveAnonToken: Save this code if you might want to delete this comment later — we cannot recover it for you.

upload.hint: Images (JPG, PNG, GIF, WEBP), videos (MP4, WEBM), or PDFs — up to {{max}} MB each, max {{files}} files.
upload.tooLarge: "{{name}}" is over {{max}} MB and was skipped.

admin.title: Admin panel
admin.anonNote: Anonymous ideas are intentionally excluded from this list.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: That page doesn't exist, or you don't have access to it.
